'''Lamaro system''', also known as '''LM0228''', was a little-known,<ref name="BL" /> mostly indomitable<ref name="UAA">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref> system in the outer reaches of the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]]. After being settled by [[Hugo Bartyn]] and the [[Outer Rim Oreworks Company]], Bartyn took care of modifying [[Star map/Legends|star-charts]] and maps so that the system would be hardly reachable.
